arts.ttl: Report: Former Chelsea player who left club last year could already be about to have his contract terminated
arts.sum: Could he be on the move again?

arts.ttl: Three Chelsea stars drop early team news hints ahead of Southampton as Noni Madueke decision made
arts.sum: Chelsea head to Southampton in third, level on points with second-place Arsenal, while their opponents sit bottom of the Premier League on just one win all season. Madueke, who had started 11 successive top-flight matches, was dropped to the bench for Sunday's 3-0 win over Aston Villa with Pedro Neto coming back into the line up.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa slumped to 14th in Premier League after a humbling 3-0 defeat by Chelsea that saw winless run extend to EIGHT matches... What's going on at the club? Is Unai Emery's job under threat?
arts.sum: Aston Villa are currently a team in dire straits. Their 3-0 loss to Chelsea at the weekend was compounded by a toothless performance.

arts.ttl: Southampton vs Chelsea LIVE! Premier League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: The Blues head to the south coast confident of victory

arts.ttl: Fulham have Southampton's £18m deal to blame as director rules out striker transfer
arts.sum: Fulham's chances of landing the forward look slim...

arts.ttl: Chelsea eye PSG star centre-back at cut-price
arts.sum: Chelsea have identified Paris Saint-Germain defender Willian Pacho as a transfer target for 2025 - while he would be available at a very low price. The outlet says that Chelsea are admirers of Pacho, despite him being less than six months into a five-year contract at Parc des Princes.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca shares how Man City really feel about Cole Palmer after working at club
DAZN secures exclusive Fifa Club World Cup rights
arts.sum: Streaming platform DAZN secures exclusive rights to broadcast next summer's Fifa Club World Cup.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca calls on Chelsea player to do 'much better' ahead of Southampton reunion
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has called on Romeo Lavia to do "much, much better" in a Chelsea shirt, but the head coach is happy with the midfielder's performances this season. With eight Premier League appearances to his name this season, Lavia is expected to make his ninth - whether that is from the start or from the bench is a different question - against Southampton.

arts.ttl: 'Really positive': Teenage Chelsea loanee delivers verdict on his performances this season
arts.sum: Chelsea youngster Leo Castledine has opened up on his first ever loan spell away from Stamford Bridge. Chelsea have plenty of players out on loan...
